description: Recounts the way in which the Japanese at home were persuaded to support the war, which came as a complete surprise to them. A Japanese woman says, "Stories of victories, war songs, and marches over the radio all day long made us quite excited. It was almost like a festival." Clearly outlines the type of training which produced the Japanese soldier
subject: World War (1939-1945)
World War, 1939-1945
title: The World at War 22 -- Japan
